_note: spec 01 §11 v2.3 regional-cluster-base panel -- FROZEN 2026-07-21 by the acquisition recon (this workflow) on ACQUISITION-AVAILABILITY FACTS ALONE (D2 freezing rule), NEVER on fit results. BINDING availability fact established by the recon: only agencies publishing the RCTC/TransTrack SRTP 'Route Statistics Table 3' format expose route-level annual boardings AND revenue hours (RVH) TOGETHER, and the productivity DV log(boardings/RVH) requires BOTH per route-year. The `agencies` list below is the CONFIRMED-USABLE frozen fit panel; `excluded` records the candidate agencies dropped because the route-level boardings+RVH pair is NOT both public, each with its true availability status and a records-request upgrade path. This corrects the earlier PENDING stub, which OVER-CLAIMED availability (independent review APPROVE-WITH-FIXES, 2026-07-21): the stub's boardings_rvh_source='NTD route-level ...' was wrong -- NTD is an AGENCY-level source, not route-level. Consumed via val('screen_regional_agencies') (a config-tier pointer; the registry value is a note, this file is the frozen data); the phase-2b-v23 fit reads this list. Frozen before any coefficient is fitted.
freeze_basis: RCTC/TransTrack SRTP 'Route Statistics Table 3' is the only public format exposing route-level boardings AND RVH together; the confirmed-usable panel is exactly the agencies publishing it (plus OCTA's committed APC tables).
cluster_count_note: OCTA 63 + RTA 36 + SunLine 14 + small RCTC/TransTrack city operators (Corona Cruiser 3 + Pass Transit 5 + PVVTA/Blythe 4 = ~12) = ~125 route-clusters. ~2x the OC-only 63-cluster base -- NOT the several hundred originally hoped in the owner directive.

agencies.fy_coverage: fy2017, fy2019, fy2020, fy2021, fy2022, fy2023 (screen_panel_ext_fys)

agencies.boardings_rvh_source: RCTC/TransTrack SRTP Route Statistics Table 3 (route-level boardings + RVH), rctc.org
agencies.fy_coverage: per manifest (SRTP fiscal years joinable to archived/current GTFS)
agencies.status: CONFIRMED-USABLE (route-level boardings + RVH both public; recon-verified)
